'''Qoribu''' was a ringed [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Gyuel system]] with 55 [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Jwlio]], [[Eyyl]], [[Zvbo]], [[Ruu (moon)|Ruu]], [[Nrogu]], and [[Kr]].

{{Planet-stub}}
